name: Textile Spindle
shortDescription: High-precision spindles for ring and rotor spinning machines, engineered for low vibration and high speed.

name: Weaving Loom
shortDescription: Rapier and air-jet weaving looms for high-efficiency fabric production with advanced control systems.

name: Circular Knitting Machine
shortDescription: High-speed circular knitting machines for seamless fabric production with multiple feeders.

name: Dyeing Machine
shortDescription: Energy-efficient dyeing machines with precise temperature and flow control for consistent color results.

name: Stenter Frame
shortDescription: Stenter frames for fabric finishing, drying, and heat setting with uniform temperature distribution.

name: Yarn Twisting Machine
shortDescription: Two-for-one twisting machines for high-quality twisted yarn with low energy consumption.
